titleStmt.title: SII 36.253: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 253. (A.R. No. 253 of 1910.) IḌAIYARPĀKKAM (Eḍayarpākkam), SRIPERUMBUDUR TALUK, CHINGELPUT DISTRICT. On the south base of the Śiva temple.

summary.p: Built in at the bottom and incomplete. Seems to refer to an assignment of cows as an alternative arrangement made by the Ūrar of Purisai for maintaining (3/4) of a lamp in the temple of Tiruppaḍakkāḍudaiyār. The land, measuring one vēli in extent, granted as nundāviḷakkup-paṭṭi by Āṇḍamaichchāni, the daughter of Aruḷāḷa Bhaṭṭan, from Iḍaiyarruppākkam alias Rājavichchādhara-chaturvēdimaṅgalam on an earlier occasion became uncultivable due to water logging and therefore the lamp could not be maintained, which necessitated the rearrangement.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ si Irājātirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 1 vatu puraṭṭāti māsattu Iṭaiyāṟṟup pākkamāṉa Irājavijātirac catuppe
timaṅkalattu savaṉaṉ Aruḷāḷa paṭṭaṉ makaḷ Āṇṭamaiccāni Āḷuṭaiyār tiruppaṭakkāṭuṭaiyāṟku Ittevar tevatāṉam puricaiyūril Ūr pakkal
tirununtāviḷakku paṭṭiyākak koṇṭu viṭṭa nilam Oruveliyum Ēri koḷātalālum kirāmāṉatamātalālum Innilattukku kāṇiyāḷanāy payiṟce
yvārilāmal Ivviḷakku viḻuntu kiṭantamaiyil Innilattāl Ivviḷakku cellāmai Ivvūrārai Uṅkaḷ nilam nīṅkaḷē kaikkoṇṭu Innilat
tāluḷḷa tirununtāviḷakku mukkālukkum pacu viṭaveṇumeṉṟu colli Ivvūrār pacu viṭa Ivvūrār pakkal Iviḷakku mukkālukkum pacukkaikko
Digital edition of SII 36.253 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
